/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ: 1 DAY/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 1 DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 09-17-2014 /X:PAROLEE IS FINISHED WITH PAROLE SUPERVISION AS OF TODAY IN LIGHT OF THE SENTENCE,/

/CAL:MOTION TO VACATE SENTENCE/MO GRTD/X:10-24-14 SENTENCE IS VACATED/X:DEFENDANT FAILED TO PARTICIPATE AT THE PAROLE SERVICE CENTER, THEREFORE,MAXIMUM SENTENCE IS IMPOSED,/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:180 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 41 DAYS,/4019HALF/SHER/NUNCDAT:02-25-15/NB/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 09-17-14/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:70 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  16  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MUST REPORT TO HIS PAROLE AGENT FORA REFERRAL TO 111 TAYLOR (PAROLEE SERVICE CENTER) UPON HIS RELEASE,  HE MUST REMAIN AT 111 TAYLOR (PAROLEE SERVICE CENTER) UNTIL HIS DISCHARGE FROM PAROLE WHICH IS ANTICIPATED TO BE THE LAST WEEK OF APRIL OF 2015,CLIENT MUSTALSO PAY RESTITUTION STEMMING FROM HIS RECENT ARREST,IF MR, YEE FAILS TO PARTICIPATE AT THE PAROLEE SERVICE CENTER, THIS SENTENCE SHALL BE VACATED ANDA NEW SENTENCE OF 180 DAYS IN THE COUNTY JAIL SHALL BE ISSUED,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:09-17-14 /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
